headline: Has Netflix (NFLX) Become A Potential Opportunity After Its Recent Share Price Slump?
summary: Wondering whether Netflix is starting to look like value or still priced for perfection? This article breaks down what the current share price is really implying. Netflix closed at US$82.18, with the stock down 4.5% over the past week, 6.9% over the past month, 9.7% year to date and 33.8% over the past year, while still showing a 95.7% gain over three years and 68.1% over five years. Recent headlines have focused on how investors are reassessing high growth streaming stocks, as competition,...
